title: Entity Croak Behavior
description: Allows the entity to croak at a random time interval with configurable conditions.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description:
Random range in seconds after which the croaking stops. Can also be a constant.

Sample values:
• frog: 4.5
duration.x-runtime-constraint-description: Check that the limits imposed on the range (minimum, maximum and maximum distance between values) are respected

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Conditions for the behavior to start and keep running. The interval between runs only starts after passing the filters.

Sample values:
• frog: {"all_of":[{"test":"in_water","value":false},{"...

interval.title: Interval
interval.description:
Random range in seconds between runs of this behavior. Can also be a constant.

Sample values:
• frog: [10,20]
interval.x-runtime-constraint-description: Check that the limits imposed on the range (minimum, maximum and maximum distance between values) are respected

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• frog: 9
